prompt.text: Ask the customer for their transaction ID or the date and amount of the failed payment.
Review the transaction record and click the advance button to confirm the failure code.
Check the failure code against eligibility rules. Confirm the refund type that applies.
Review the refund policy. Select the correct option for this transaction type.
Confirm the refund details. Add a case note, then click 'Initiate Refund'.
Return to the customer tab and deliver the update below.

screenConfigs.title: Transaction Search
screenConfigs.placeholder: Enter transaction ID or order ID...

screenConfigs.title: Refund Eligibility Check
screenConfigs.statusText: Transaction failure code {{default_failure_code}} qualifies for automatic reversal. Merchant has confirmed the transaction was not received on their end.

screenConfigs.title: Refund Options
screenConfigs.policy:
FAILED TRANSACTION REFUND POLICY

Automatic Reversal Eligibility
  • Gateway timeout / failed authorizations:  ELIGIBLE ✓
  • Duplicate charges:                         ELIGIBLE ✓
  • Merchant disputes (no failure code):       Requires investigation

Processing Timelines
  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  Automatic reversal:         1–3 business days       │
  │  Manual refund initiation:   3–5 business days       │
  │  Provisional credit:         Same day (if eligible)  │
  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Provisional Credit
  • Available for transactions > $100 pending > 2 business days
  • Applied while investigation is in progress
  • Reversed if merchant confirms transaction was successful
screenConfigs.correctMessage: Correct. Issue provisional credit today and initiate the automatic reversal process.

screenConfigs.title: Process Refund
screenConfigs.notePlaceholder: e.g. Customer called re: failed {{default_amount}} transaction on {{default_date_short}}. {{default_failure_code}} confirmed. Automatic reversal initiated. Provisional credit of {{default_amount}} applied today.

screenConfigs.title: Case Resolved — Communicate to Customer
screenConfigs.script:
"{{first_name}}, I've reviewed your account and confirmed that the {{default_amount}} transaction on {{default_date_display}} failed on our end — the failure code shows a gateway timeout, which means the merchant never actually received the funds.

I've initiated an automatic reversal, which will return the {{default_amount}} to your account within 1 to 3 business days. I've also applied a provisional credit of {{default_amount}} to your account effective today so you have access to those funds right away.

Is there anything else I can help you with?"
screenConfigs.resolution: Automatic reversal initiated. Provisional credit of {{default_amount}} applied. Customer informed.
